Source   Edit  

Imports

stringresize

Types

BufferLoader = proc (): string
Source   Edit   
LoadBuffer = object
  data*: string              ## buffer string, users need to access directly & keep track of position
  loader*: BufferLoader ## loads a string at a time to add to the buffer when needed
                        ## set to nil after returning empty string
  freeBefore*: int           ## position before which we can cull the buffer
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc callLoader(buffer: var LoadBuffer): int {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer loader is known not to be nil returns number of moved chars Source   Edit   
proc callLoaderBy(buffer: var LoadBuffer; n: int): int {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer loader is known not to be nil returns number of moved chars Source   Edit   
proc initLoadBuffer(file: File; loadAmount = 16; capacity = 32): LoadBuffer {.
    inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
file has to last as long as the reader Source   Edit   
proc initLoadBuffer(loader: BufferLoader; capacity = 32): LoadBuffer {.inline,
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit

    tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc loadBy(buffer: var LoadBuffer; n: int): int {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
returns number of moved chars Source   Edit   
proc loadOnce(buffer: var LoadBuffer): int {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
returns number of moved chars Source   Edit
